root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_application_form.member_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_application_form.member_surname as memname, sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.memtype_control, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_app_work_info.working_date ) as working_date_tdate , sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id, pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id ,'###-#-#####-####') as format_hum_id , sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no, sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date ) as apply_date_tdate, pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth, localtimestamp) as age, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth ) as date_of_birth_tdate, (CASE sc_mem_m_application_form.sex WHEN 'M' THEN 'ชาย' ELSE 'หญิง' END) as sex, sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status, FPA_TEL_GET_MEMNO_BY_APPNO(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as c_membership_no, --FPA_TEL_GET_BANK_NO_BY_APPNO(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no)as c_bank_acc_no , sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position, (select description from sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position where group_position = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position) as group_position_desc, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.working_date, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_id , sc_mem_m_app_share.share_monthly , pka_mem.fp_desc_position(sc_mem_m_app_work_info .position_long) as position_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!apply_date_2!' , 'MONTH YYYY' ) as apply_date_full --to_char('!apply_date_2!' , 'MM') as apply_month, --to_char('!apply_date_2!' , 'YYYY') as apply_year, --pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((to_char('!apply_date_2!' , 'MM'))::int) as thai_month
from sc_mem_m_application_form , sc_mem_m_app_work_info , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_app_share , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
where sc_mem_m_app_work_info.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.prename_code and sc_mem_m_app_share.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type
--and to_char(sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , 'MM') = '!month!' --and to_char(sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , 'YYYY') = '!year!' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no --and sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = '6300023'
